sentences.translation: Hodanje je laka i korisna vježba za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is an easy and beneficial exercise for the body.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي فِي الحَدِيقَةِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam u parku trideset minuta svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: I walk in the park for thirty minutes every day.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ العَادَةُ تُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى تَحْسِينِ مِزَاجِي وَصِحَّتِي البَدَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika mi pomaže da poboljšam svoje raspoloženje i fizičko zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: This habit helps me improve my mood and physical health.
